project_info.vibe: Pastel brown/beige, warm cream, aspirational, elegant, pure smile aesthetic.

ui_elements.liquid_glass_button: relative overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/50 border border-white/60 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(188,163,143,0.2)] hover:bg-white/70 hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(188,163,143,0.3)] active:scale-95 transition-all duration-500 text-[#2C2621] font-medium px-8 py-4 before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-white/50 before:to-transparent before:-translate-x-full hover:before:animate-[shimmer_1.5s_infinite]
ui_elements.floating_action_cluster: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 flex flex-col gap-3 p-3 rounded-full backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/70 border border-white/60 shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]
ui_elements.action_cluster_icon: w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/80 text-[#2C2621] hover:bg-[#BCA38F] hover:text-white transition-colors shadow-sm
ui_elements.cards: rounded-[2rem] bg-gradient-to-b from-[#F5F0E6] to-[#FAF8F5] p-8 md:p-12 border border-white/50 shadow-sm
ui_elements.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 border-b border-white/50

animations.smooth_scroll: Lenis library must be used for momentum scrolling.
animations.hero_cinematic: GSAP ScrollTrigger: Hero image starts at scale 1.15 and scales to 1.0 on scroll. Headlines use staggered Y-axis reveal (opacity 0 to 1, y: 40 to 0).
animations.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (y: 20) for all main sections when entering viewport via GSAP ScrollTrigger.
animations.hover_effects: Cards slightly lift (-translate-y-2) with expanded shadow. Images within cards slowly zoom (scale 1.05) on hover.

layouts.spacing_system: Hyper-generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for main sections. Use gap-12 or gap-16 in grids.
layouts.bento_grid: For Services and Gallery. Mix span-1 and span-2 columns to create asymmetry.
layouts.header_structure: Flex justify-between. Left: Smile Savers Clinic Text/Logo. Right: Text 'NABH Accredited' with a subtle medical cross icon + Main Nav + CTA.

pages.Home: Cinematic hero, services bento grid, testimonial slider, doctors preview.
pages.About: Clinic history, NABH focus, interior gallery, mission.
pages.Services: List of treatments with aesthetic cards.
pages.Service Detail: Deep dive into treatment + 4-step booking stepper (Shadcn Tabs customized).
pages.Gallery: Masonry/Bento layout of clinic and patient smiles.
pages.Blog Detail: Clean editorial layout, Fraunces for heading, large cover image.
pages.Testimonials: Google review integration style but aesthetic (drag-slider).
pages.Contact: Map, form with liquid glass styling.

testing_requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, links, and forms MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'data-testid="book-appointment-btn"').
instructions_to_agent: Do NOT use generic Tailwind colors (slate, blue, gray). ONLY use the hex codes provided in the colors section to maintain the pastel brown/beige aesthetic.
Add the font imports to index.css and configure tailwind.config.js to use Fraunces and Manrope.
Ensure all buttons use the 'liquid_glass_button' styling or a derivation of it.
Build the Floating Action Cluster globally (WhatsApp, AI Chat (Claude), Call).
Use Shadcn/UI for the 4-step booking system, but override the styles to match the warm, aesthetic, curved theme.
Implement GSAP and Lenis. Ensure robust cleanup in useEffects.
